title: Tattoo Dungeon
description:
Tattoo Dungeon is an 8-bit action-platformer with some metroidvania influence. It's an indie homebrew gameboy color game, ported to play easily on PCs. This version of the game retains it's original retro 8-bit "charm" just as if you were playing on the original handheld.

Features• Lost Flash: Recover 20 hidden tattoo designs to fill your gallery.
• Tattoo Skin Maps: Tattoo skin maps to reveal secrets and a hidden power.
• 12 Bosses: Defeat bosses and minibosses to save your town from invasion.
• 4 Weapons: Smash monsters using your trusty chain and 3 special weapons.
• Power-Ups: Discover upgrades to unlock new areas and track down secrets.

The Ultimate Challenge: Players who achieve 100% completion will unlock the true final boss.

PC Only Features• Optional Shaders: gbc style grid, scanline shader, with CRT options. 
• Resolution Options: Upscaled full screen and art bezel options.

Estimated Playtime: ~5+ hours for first playthrough; 2+ hours for optimized speedruns.

Physical cartridge release is planned for later in the year. Best way to support is by buying the game here while waiting for the cartridge.

CreditsDevelopment, art, design by Jaboc

Music by ExtremeJay, Jaboc

SFX by Tronimal, Beatscribe

Created in GB Studio
description_short: Tattoo Dungeon is an action-adventure style platformer, where you play as a tattoo apprentice who gets thrown into the midst of an invasion of other-dimensional tattoo monsters, all while trying to find your mentor's lost tattoo flash!
